params.name: Royal Seal
params.description: The Royal Seal, or the Joseon Royal Seal, is an important artifact from the Joseon dynasty, primarily used for the investiture of crown princes or princesses. These seals are exquisitely crafted, often made from precious jade materials, with smooth lines and clear details, reflecting the superb craftsmanship of the time. Additionally, the inscriptions on the seals are mostly in nine-fold seal script, showing their deep connection with the Ming dynasty. The Joseon Royal Seal is not only a symbol  …
